name: Conquer The Heroine #2: Martial Arts Queen Serena
description:
You’re a professional martial artist, and to prove your strength, you go around challenging other notable fighters and defeating them. At this point in your journey, you have been undefeated, but you had one final test ahead of you. The one who stands above all, the peak of the world of martial arts, Serena. Just like you, she was undefeated, and held her title as queen of martial arts for several long years. Everyone who you’ve spoken to have described her as an unstoppable force, as second to none, and you’re determined to prove that statement wrong.

To the guy who wanted it, here you go.
creator: Liz Miyazaki
